title: The Big Picture: Capesize market
summary:
Main
By Nick Ristic
The bulls are back in town
Capesize rates surged this week, late to the party that the Panamaxes and geared ships enjoyed last month. At the time of writing, the Baltic Capesize index stands at $28,056/day, almost three times higher than average for this time of year, though still shy of last October 2020's peak. The rally has been driven by the Pacific basin.
